summary: ERIE recent price action shows decline from ~$295 in late Nov to ~$280 range. Last data point Jan 5 close: $280.47. Previous close (Jan 2): $276.37. Question asks about Jan 6 close vs Jan 14 close.
content:
ERIE 3-month history shows:
- Late Nov peak: ~$294-295
- Dec 8 sharp drop to ~$279
- Dec 9-10 further decline to ~$273
- Recovery to ~$285-287 range mid-Dec
- Dec 19 another dip to ~$282
- Year-end: ~$285-286
- Jan 2: dropped to $276.37
- Jan 5: recovered to $280.47
Current price (as of query): $280.47
Previous close: $276.37

The question was created Jan 3 with last known price $277.81. Today (Jan 6) is the reference date. We need Jan 6 close price (not yet available in history) and whether Jan 14 close will be higher.
